LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER IS CONTINUED TO JULY 12, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF NADER SHABAHANNGI'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THAT THE APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER IS EITHER NECESSARY OR APPROPRIATE UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 564. BASED ON DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATION IN HIS OPPOSITION PAPERS THAT HE INTENDS TO CONTINUE TO APPLY ALL RENT PAYMENTS RECEIVED FROM 124-126 HAIGHT STREET TO THE PAYMENT OF REAL PROPERTY TAXES AND MORTGAGES ON THE PROPERTIES, HE IS REQUIRED TO DO SO PENDING FINAL RESOLUTION OF THIS CASE OR OTHER COURT ORDER TO THE CONTRARY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
ORDER DENYING MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is reset to JAN-15-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. DANNIEL CANO, TEL. NO. 260-0729 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NADER SHABAHANNGI'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A RECEIVER is Denied. Plaintiff has not shown that the appointment of a receiver is either necessary or appropriate under Code of Civil Procedure section 564. Based on Defendant's representation in his opposition papers that he intends to continue to apply all rent payments received from 124-126 Haight Street to the payment of real property taxes and mortgages on the properties, he is required to do so pending final resolution of this case or other court order to the contrary. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =(302/HEK)

Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver
Off Calendar Jun-28-2012 Continued To Jul-12-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER is continued to July 12, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 302 per agreement of parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver
Off Calendar May-29-2012 Continued To Jun-28-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
